subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Riḍá! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from the Supreme Horizon and draweth thee near unto Him in all conditions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل رضا یذکرک المظلوم من الافق الاعلی و یقربک الیه فی کل الاحوال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual transformation
